summary: CFO-grade 18-week cashflow projection features tested successfully. All 9 features verified and working correctly.

feature_1_18_weeks.notes: Table header shows S1-S18 with dates and data type labels

feature_2_cfo_kpis.description: CFO KPIs cards displayed: Net Burn Rate, Cash Gap Analysis, Volatilidad del Flujo, Indicadores Operativos
feature_2_cfo_kpis.notes: All 4 KPI cards visible with correct data: Net Burn Rate (Real S1-S4 and Proy S6-S18), Cash Gap Analysis (Umbral mínimo, Semanas en riesgo, Semana crítica), Volatilidad (Desv. Estándar, Coef. Variación), Indicadores Operativos (Runway, Ratio Cobranza/Pagos)

feature_3_flujo_acumulado.description: Section 'Flujo de Caja Acumulado: Real vs Proyectado' shows totals correctly
feature_3_flujo_acumulado.notes: Shows Ingresos Reales (S1-S5), Egresos Reales (S1-S5), Ingresos Proyectados (S6-S18), Egresos Proyectados (S6-S18), Flujo Neto Real Acumulado, Flujo Neto Proyectado Total

feature_4_week_labels.description: Weeks S1-S4 marked as 'Real', S5 as 'Actual', S6-S18 as 'Proy'
feature_4_week_labels.notes: Each week column has colored label: Real (yellow), Actual (blue), Proy (gray)

feature_5_saldo_inicial.description: Table has 'SALDO INICIAL SEMANA' row with values per week
feature_5_saldo_inicial.notes: Blue row at top of table showing initial balance for each week

feature_6_saldo_final.description: Table has 'SALDO FINAL SEMANA' row at the end
feature_6_saldo_final.notes: Dark row at bottom showing final balance per week with color coding (green positive, red negative)

feature_7_cash_gap_row.description: Table has 'CASH GAP' row showing difference vs configurable threshold
feature_7_cash_gap_row.notes: Amber row showing gap vs umbral mínimo, negative values in red with parentheses

feature_8_config_umbral.description: Configurar button allows modifying 'Umbral Mínimo de Caja'
feature_8_config_umbral.notes: Config dialog has input field for Umbral Mínimo de Caja (Cash Gap Analysis) with default 500000

feature_9_currency_selector.description: Currency selector (MXN, USD, EUR) works and converts values
feature_9_currency_selector.notes: Dropdown shows 8 currencies (MXN, USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CHF, CAD, CNY). When non-MXN selected, shows exchange rate badge 'TC: 1 USD = $17.4545 MXN' and all values converted

context_for_next_testing_agent: CFO-grade 18-week cashflow projection features fully implemented and working. The /projections page shows: (1) 18 weeks with S1-S4 Real, S5 Actual, S6-S18 Proyectado labels, (2) CFO KPIs dashboard with Net Burn Rate, Cash Gap Analysis, Volatilidad del Flujo, Indicadores Operativos, (3) Flujo Acumulado Real vs Proyectado section, (4) SALDO INICIAL SEMANA and SALDO FINAL SEMANA rows, (5) CASH GAP row with configurable threshold via Configurar button, (6) Multi-currency support (MXN, USD, EUR, etc.) with live conversion.

mocked_apis.Belvo Open Banking: MOCKED - Belvo integration is scaffolded but not connected (needs user credentials)
